chunks.text: How you can try all possible spanning trees and then from that you can check whichever

chunks.text: This is one method.

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Trying all possible spanning trees will be too lengthy.

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Is there any greedy method.

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Yes the greedy methods are available for finding the minimum cost spanning tree.

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: If a weighted graph is given you can find out the minimum cost spanning tree by following

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: the method without finding out all possible spanning trees.

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So what are those methods.

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: One method is Prim's algorithm and the second method is Kruskal's algorithm.

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: There are two algorithms for finding minimum cost spanning tree.

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: I have a weighted graph here and I have to find a minimum cost spanning tree by following

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Prim's algorithm.

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Let us see how Prim's algorithm works through an example.

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: As per Prim's algorithm he says that from a graph first of all you select a minimum

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: cost edge.

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So the smallest edge in the entire graph is this one.

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Then this is the initial one.

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Now for the rest of the procedure always select a minimum cost edge from the graph but make

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: sure that it should be connected to already selected vertices.

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Now the next minimum is which one 3 to 4.

chunks.text: Don't take that it will not be connected to 1 or 6.

chunks.text: So take only those which are connected to 1 or 6 means what he is trying to do is always

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: maintain a tree.

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Prim thinks that if some farther away edge is selected then it may not be forming a tree

chunks.text: finally.

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So that is the reason he suggested that always select a minimum edge which should be connected.

chunks.text: The cost of a tree is if I add all these.

chunks.text: So the approach of prims is initially select the smallest one.

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Next method for finding minimum cost spanning tree is Kruskal's method.

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: This also follows a greedy approach.

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Instead of trying out all possible spanning trees it shows a procedure by following which

chunks.text: we can get a minimum cost spanning tree.

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: It says that always select a minimum cost edge.

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Always select a minimum cost edge.

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Let us follow this one.

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Select smallest edge 1 to 6 that is 10.

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: This one is smallest and the next smallest is 3 to 4.

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So the second edge I am selecting is 3 to 4 and its cost is 12.

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Next minimum is 2 to 7.

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Select 2 to 7 and this is 14.

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Next minimum is 2 to 3 that is 16.

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: After this the next minimum edge is 7 to 4 but that is 18.

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: If I select that it will form a cycle.

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Yes Kruskal's method says that always select a minimum cost edge but if it is forming a

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: cycle don't include it in the solution.

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Discard that edge.

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Don't include that edge.

chunks.title: Prims and Kruskals Algorithms - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
